_doc: Recipients for the daily productivity & AI-leverage report. Delivery is gated OFF by default (env PRODUCTIVITY_REPORT_DELIVERY=1 to enable). SMTP creds come from GMAIL_SMTP_USERNAME + GMAIL_SMTP_APP_PASSWORD, same as the pilot dashboards. Add operators/leads to bcc as the audience grows.

bc_token_health._doc: Recipients for the daily Basecamp token-health alert (fires only when a BC identity needs attention). Ali + Kes per the fix request.
